DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43am and concluding at 9:59am.

Attorney for Plaintiff Steven Booska appeared via zoom. .
Defendants Landmark Musical Theater, Inc., Jonathan Rosen, and Richard Ciccarcone not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff NAMIR FEIGI who appeared via zoom and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Sunhill Enterprises LP, and against Defendants Landmark Musical Theater, Inc., Jonathan Rosen, and Richard Ciccarcone, as follows:

Damages: $202,827.60
Prejudgment Interest: $16,948.61
Attorney Fees: $3,900.00
Costs: $1,050.31

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $224,726.52

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
